title: Thelypodium hookeri
taxonomy: Thelypodium hookeri is classified in the family Brassicaceae, which is a large family of flowering plants commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. It is placed in the tribe Thelypodieae, a group of plants that are closely related to the genus Cardamine. At the genus level, Thelypodium hookeri is a member of the monotypic genus Thelypodium, which is a small group of plants found in the western United States.
